description_long: This is a split ergonomic keyboard with a distinctive curved and contoured design, intended to promote a more natural hand and wrist position during typing. The keyboard is primarily off-white or beige in color, with a full set of alphanumeric keys, function keys, and a dedicated numeric keypad on the right side. The keycaps are slightly concave and arranged in a staggered layout, with a visible gap in the center to separate the left and right hand sections. The casing is made of hard plastic, and the overall build appears robust, with a slightly raised central section for ergonomic support. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and a small colored logo is present on the left side of the keyboard.
description: A split ergonomic keyboard with a curved, off-white plastic body and a full set of keys, including a numeric keypad. The design features a central gap and contoured key layout for comfortable typing.
description_view_0: Angled view from the left, showing the split ergonomic design, curved key layout, and a small colored logo on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central split, staggered key arrangement, and the full width of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Angled view from the right, displaying the numeric keypad and the right-hand section of the split design.
description_view_3: Direct view from the top front, clearly showing the separation between the left and right key groups and the overall ergonomic contour.
